BA · Fraud Analytics

Analytics Fraud Detection (BI-FAST)

Designed the Analytic Fraud application that automates analysis of BI-FAST O70 alerts — Fav Dest history checks and name similarity (Levenshtein + Jaro-Winkler) — replacing manual Excel worksheets.

Career

Work Experience

Professional background across business analysis, automation, and operations.

IT Business Analyst — PT Bank Central Asia (BCA)

Nov 2025 – Present • Tangerang

Led end-to-end business analysis for the Fraud Detection System (FDS) & BI-FAST transaction monitoring. Led a continuous improvement project that reduced operational workload by 70%, built a real-time transaction monitoring dashboard, and independently developed automation workflows (Power Automate / RPA) from concept to go-live. Bridged business needs with the IT/Machine Learning team through BRDs & technical specifications, and led UAT cycles and operator training.

Android Mobile Programmer — PT Medilink Digital Medika

Mar 2025 – Oct 2025 • Jakarta Utara

Developed cross-platform mobile features (Android & iOS) with SwiftUI, UIKit, and Android Native Java. Implemented RESTful APIs (Postman, OpenAPI standard), applied best practices for authentication, data handling, & permission management, and collaborated with the backend team to optimize client-server architecture performance. Performed end-to-end debugging and Git-flow management to maintain code quality & delivery timeline accuracy.

Junior iOS Developer — Apple Developer Academy @BINUS

Mar 2024 – Dec 2024 • Tangerang

Managed the full product lifecycle from ideation to App Store launch using a Challenge-Based Learning (CBL) approach. Executed end-to-end delivery of 7 digital products (47+ users) & TestFlight betas, led 3+ research projects with 20+ in-depth user interviews, and iterated on data-driven solutions from stakeholder feedback across beta cycles.
